stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Given the system in the annex which of these statements about cross feeding is correct?

options.a: Fuel supply is possible from any tank to any main engine.
options.b: Cross feeding is not possible when one cross feed valve is closed.
options.c: Fuel supply is possible only from the centre tank to any main engine.
options.d: Fuel supply is possible only from the left main tank to the right main engine.
